title: NO lava chicken Music Disc
description: This resource pack removes the disliked Lava Chicken music disc from the Minecraft movie and replaces it with the melodic “Dalarna” track from Minecraft Dungeons, improving your game’s music without altering other textures or sounds.
body:
This resource pack enhances your Minecraft audio experience by completely removing the controversial “**Lava Chicken**” music disc from the Minecraft movie and replacing it with the beautifully composed “**Dalarna**” track from Minecraft Dungeons.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/McKTbntEShA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Many players have found the original Lava Chicken disc to be abrupt and inconsistent with Minecraft’s classic soundtrack, disrupting immersion. This pack fixes that by delivering a smoother, more fitting music choice without changing anything else in the game.

## **Key Features:**

- Removes the “Lava Chicken” music disc from the game and inventory.
  
- Replaces it with the melodic and atmospheric “Dalarna” track from Minecraft Dungeons.
  
- Maintains all original textures, sounds, and game assets except the specific music disc replacement.
  
- Ensures a consistent and immersive audio experience aligned with Minecraft’s classic atmosphere.
  
- Simple installation without conflicts or additional modifications.
  
- Ideal for players seeking a refined and pleasant soundtrack without losing the authentic Minecraft feel.
  
Use this pack to improve your Minecraft soundtrack while keeping the game’s original look and gameplay intact.
